typeLine: Seething Eternal Mana Flask of Motion
explicitMods: 66% reduced Amount Recovered
Instant Recovery
Grants Immunity to Hinder for 10 seconds if used while Hindered
Grants Immunity to Maim for 11 seconds if used while Maimed
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
124% increased Evasion and Energy Shield
+37 to maximum Energy Shield
+63 to maximum Life
+41% to Cold Resistance
88% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
45% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Skills have 1% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Spends a portion of your mana to grant a buff that takes some of the damage from hits for you until depleted. The buff grants added lightning damage based on the amount of mana spent by this skill. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: Base duration is 3.00 seconds
Spends 65% of current Mana

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to Mana Spent by this Skill's effect
Buff grants Added Lightning Damage equal to 15% of Mana Spent by this Skill's effect
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
20% increased Buff Effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Recalls all minions that are following you to your location, and grants them a temporary life regeneration effect.
explicitMods: Base duration is 2.00 seconds
23% increased Skill Effect Duration
Regenerate 2% of Life per second
23% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Places a Sigil on the ground, which grants a buff to you and allies in the area around it for a duration. The Sigil gains stages as you spend mana in its area, making the buff more powerful. You can only have one Sigil of Power at a time.
explicitMods: Base duration is 12.00 seconds
Gains a Stage when you Spend a total of 461 Mana while in Area
Enemies in Area deal 24% less Damage while at maximum Stages
Maximum 4 Stages
Buff grants 8 to 153 Added Lightning Damage per Stage
Minimum 1 second between Stages
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 6% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills have 50% chance to ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills have 50% chance to ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: It was a delicate balancing act for Malachai to ensure the loyalty
of his three students - each as ambitious as they were depraved.

name: Atziri's Foible
explicitMods: +120 to maximum Mana
28% increased maximum Mana
120% increased Mana Regeneration Rate
Items and Gems have 25% reduced Attribute Requirements
flavourText: The world is but a piece of parchment, blank and symmetric.
We label each side: one Good, one Evil; one Black, one White.
The divine truth, however, is that both are one and the same.
-Jaetai, Vaal Advisor

name: Widowhail
implicitMods: Socketed Gems are supported by Level 10 Faster Projectiles
explicitMods: 247% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
cosmeticMods: Has Windripper Skin. You can reclaim this by shift-clicking this item.
flavourText: "I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe
